title: PolyRig pack.yaml
description: Metadata for a PolyRig pack (packs/<type>/<id>/pack.yaml). The instance format is YAML; validation is applied to the object obtained after parsing the YAML. A pack is a pure data directory: this file plus knowledge/, verify.md, and optionally deps.yaml and scripts/.

id.description: Pack identifier: '<type>/<short-name>', e.g. 'stack/android' or 'domain/auth-google'. Must agree with the pack's directory path and with the 'type' field.

type.description: Pack type. 'stack' packs carry framework conventions, project structure, and build/verify commands; 'domain' packs carry business domain knowledge.

version.description: Semantic version of the pack content, e.g. '0.1.0'.

last_reviewed.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) the pack content was last reviewed by a human. Older than the staleness threshold (default 180 days) triggers a warning during assembly.

summary.description: One-line description of what the pack covers.

requires.description: Ids of packs this pack depends on, e.g. domain/auth-google requires [domain/auth-core]. Resolved during assembly.

conflicts.description: Ids of packs that must not be selected together with this pack.

provides.description: Capability tags this pack provides, e.g. ['google-sign-in'].

stacks.description: Stack short-names (e.g. 'android', 'backend-fastapi') covered by this pack's knowledge/per-stack/ notes. Meaningful for domain packs; each listed stack should have a matching knowledge/per-stack/<stack>.md.

trust.description: Trust declaration for the pack, evaluated together with the discovery root it was found in (builtin/user/project rules take precedence over what a pack claims for itself).

level.description: Trust level the pack is authored for. 'remote' is unsupported in v1.

scripts_enabled_by_default.description: Whether the pack's scripts/ may run without per-run confirmation. Effective only within the trust rules of the discovery root; project-level pack scripts never run by default regardless of this flag.

requires_confirmation.description: Whether selecting this pack (and especially running its scripts) requires explicit user confirmation during assembly.
